Primary Eligibility Requirements: Unpaid expenses for medical treatment, home modifications, mortgage to prevent foreclosure, palliative care, or funeral costs for dependant
Documentation Required: HIGH: ATO application, unpaid invoices/bills/quotes, proof no other payment method, proof Australian/NZ citizenship/residency
Maximum Amount: Only amount needed for specific expense (no set limit)
Tax Treatment: Taxed as normal super lump sum (17-22% if under 60, tax-free if 60+)

Withdrawal Type: Severe Financial Hardship (Under preservation age + 39 weeks)
Primary Eligibility Requirements: Receiving Commonwealth income support for 26 continuous weeks + unable to meet reasonable family living expenses
Documentation Required: MEDIUM: Centrelink Customer Reference Number (CRN), Q230 letter from Centrelink, proof of expenses, income statement
Tax Treatment: Taxed as super lump sum (17-22% if under 60)

Withdrawal Type: Severe Financial Hardship (Over preservation age + 39 weeks)
Primary Eligibility Requirements: Age 60+ 39 weeks, receiving income support for cumulative 39 weeks since age 60, unemployed/working <10 hrs/week
Documentation Required: MEDIUM: CRN, proof of age, employment status verification, cumulative payment history since age 60
Tax Treatment: Taxed as super lump sum (17-22% if under 60, tax-free if 60+)

Primary Eligibility Requirements: Two medical practitioners certify terminal illness likely to cause death within 24 months (one must be specialist)
Documentation Required: HIGH: Two medical certificates (one from specialist), proof of 24-month prognosis, identity documents

Primary Eligibility Requirements: Permanent physical/mental condition preventing return to any suitable work, certified by 2 medical practitioners
Documentation Required: HIGH: Two medical assessments confirming permanent incapacity, detailed medical reports, work capacity assessments
Tax Treatment: Taxed as super lump sum (17-22% if under 60, tax-free if 60+)

Primary Eligibility Requirements: Age 18+, never owned property in Australia, plan to live in property 6+ months, made voluntary super contributions
Documentation Required: LOW-MEDIUM: ATO determination application, proof of age, property purchase intention, residency plans
Maximum Amount: $15,000 per year, $50,000 lifetime maximum per person
Tax Treatment: Marginal tax rate with 30% tax offset for concessional contributions

Primary Eligibility Requirements: Temporary resident visa holder whose visa has expired/cancelled and has departed Australia
Documentation Required: MEDIUM: Passport, visa information, certified ID copies, bank details, super fund details, departure proof
Processing Time: Up to 28 days from ATO approval
Tax Treatment: Withholding tax (rates vary by visa type, typically 35-47%)

Primary Eligibility Requirements: Account balance under $200 and ceasing employment with contributing employer
Documentation Required: LOW: Employment cessation proof, account balance verification

Primary Eligibility Requirements: Have unrestricted non-preserved benefits (usually pre-July 1999 after-tax contributions)
